core_lore: The vault records every activation as living memory in its obsidian columns.
Doors open only when an artifact resonates with a matching lineage frequency.
Unregistered power surges can awaken dormant chambers and unknown guardians.
warnings: Never allow two apex artifacts to activate in the same corridor.
Spirit entities may test, mislead, or protect depending on intent.
Final echoes after activation are often clues to a larger vault conspiracy.
